Day 15 : Creating the word cloud for text analysis , completed a small python warmup project on making a word cloud and  speed clearing weeks of python  exams in hours , to complete a course , a small step which is a part of a certificate course  , also analysing working on my current side project requirement in which i will be parsing and cleaning through a lot of data specially url and tagging its components , will build a custom code first before looking around for battle tested and more popular approach to get a better understanding
